Class HoldingsHelper

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.repository.helper.HoldingsHelper
public class HoldingsHelper extends Object
Utility class for currency conversion operations in holdings calculations.

Provides efficient currency pair lookup and conversion capabilities for multi-currency portfolio management. Optimizes currency operations through caching and automatic currency pair creation.

  • Constructor Details

    • HoldingsHelper

      public HoldingsHelper()

  • Method Details

    • getUsedCurrencypiarsByIdTenant

      public static Map<FromToCurrency, Currencypair> getUsedCurrencypiarsByIdTenant(Integer idTenant, CurrencypairJpaRepository currencypairJpaRepository)
      Retrieves all currency pairs used within a tenant's portfolios and accounts.

      Returns a map for O(1) lookup performance during holdings calculations.

      Parameters:
      idTenant - the tenant identifier
      currencypairJpaRepository - repository for currency pair data access
      Returns:
      map of FromToCurrency keys to Currencypair entities

    • transformToCurrencypairMapWithFromCurrencyAsKey

      public static Map<FromToCurrency, Currencypair> transformToCurrencypairMapWithFromCurrencyAsKey(List<Currencypair> currencypairs)
      Transforms a list of currency pairs into a map for efficient lookup operations.

      Converts list to map with FromToCurrency keys for O(1) lookup instead of O(n) scanning.

      Parameters:
      currencypairs - list of currency pair entities to transform
      Returns:
      map with FromToCurrency keys and Currencypair values

    • getCurrency

      @Transactional public static Currencypair getCurrency(CurrencypairJpaRepository currencypairJpaRepository, Map<FromToCurrency, Currencypair> currencypairFromToCurrencyMap, String fromCurrency, String toCurrency)
      Retrieves or creates a currency pair for the specified conversion direction.

      Uses three-tier lookup: cache → database → create new. Updates cache with newly found or created currency pairs for optimization.

      Parameters:
      currencypairJpaRepository - repository for currency pair operations
      currencypairFromToCurrencyMap - cache map (updated by this method)
      fromCurrency - source currency code
      toCurrency - target currency code
      Returns:
      the currency pair entity for the specified conversion
